name: google-calendar
description: List upcoming events and create new events on your Google Calendar
long_description:
Full Google Calendar integration for Chitty Workspace. View your upcoming schedule and create new events — all through natural language.

**Viewing** — List upcoming events with title, time, location, description, and attendees. Filter by number of days ahead.

**Creating** — Create new events with summary, times, location, description, and attendees. Supports setting event duration and inviting people.

Authentication uses Google OAuth. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keyring.

auth.instructions: This package uses Google OAuth to access your Google Calendar. You'll authorize Chitty Workspace to read and create events on your behalf.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.help_text: Python libraries needed for Google Calendar API and secure credential storage.

setup_steps.label: Connect to Google account
setup_steps.help_text: Click 'Connect' to authorize Chitty Workspace to access your Google Calendar. A browser window will open for Google OAuth authorization.

feature_flags.label: Allow creating events
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can create new events on your Google Calendar.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to create events on your Google Calendar.

feature_flags.label: Allow inviting attendees
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can add attendees to events. Attendees are only notified if notify_attendees is also set to true.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to invite people to calendar events, potentially sharing meeting details externally.

agent_config.default_instructions: You have access to Google Calendar tools. Show event details clearly with times, locations, and attendees. Always confirm event details with the user before creating. Never create an event without explicit user confirmation.
suggested_prompts: Show me my schedule for this week
Create a meeting tomorrow at 2pm with the team
Schedule a 1-hour review meeting on Friday at 10am
What events do I have next week?
capabilities: View event details (time, location, attendees, description)
